title: Shri Naina Devi Mata Ki Aarti
intro:
Read Shri Naina Devi Mata Ki Aarti in Hindi and seek the divine blessings of Goddess Naina Devi.

────────
description:
Tera adbhut roop nirala,
Aaja! Meri Naina Maai e.
Tujhpai tan man dhan sab waaroon,
Aaja meri Naina Maai e॥
॥ Aaja meri Naina Maai e ॥

Sundar bhavan banaya tera,
Teri shobha nyari.
Neeke neeke khambhe laage,
Ad-bhut chittar kari.
Tera rang biranga dwara॥
॥ Aaja meri Naina Maai e ॥

Jhanjha aur mirdanga baaje,
Aur baaje shehnai.
Turai nagada dholak baaje,
Tabla shabda sunai.
Tere dware naubat baaje॥
॥ Aaja meri Naina Maai e ॥

Peela chola jarad kinari,
Lal dhwaja fahraye.
Sir laalon da mukut viraje,
Nigah nahin thahraye.
Tera roop na varna jaaye॥
॥ Aaja meri Naina Maai e ॥

Paan supari dhwaja,
Nariyal bhent tihari laage.
Balak boodhe nar nari ki,
Bheed khadi tere aage.
Teri jai jaikar manave॥
॥ Aaja meri Naina Maai e ॥

Koi gaaye koi bajaye,
Koi dhyan lagaye.
Koi baitha tere aangan mein,
Naam ki ter sunaye.
Koi nritya kare tere aage॥
॥ Aaja meri Naina Maai e ॥

Koi maange beta beti,
Kisi ko kanchan maya.
Koi maange jeevan saathi,
Koi sundar kaaya.
Bhakton kirpa teri maange॥
॥ Aaja meri Naina Maai e ॥
